title: sleet heartbeat
description: The body of a heartbeat object.

node_id.description:
The node that wrote this heartbeat. Duplicates the object key so
bodies are self-describing.

services.description:
Aggregate task states per offered service, across every database
the node owns.

slatedb_version.description: The slatedb version the node runs.

sleet_version.description: The sleet version the node runs.

version.description: Heartbeat format version; bumped only on incompatible change.

ServiceSummary.description:
Aggregate task states for one offered service. Only counts are
reported, because a node may own tasks for many thousands of
databases.

backoff.description: Owned tasks that crashed and are waiting out a restart delay.
